scripts.dev: node scripts/dev-bootstrap.mjs && concurrently -k false -n backend,frontend,admin -c blue,green,magenta "pnpm --filter miniapp-backend dev" "pnpm --filter miniapp-frontend dev" "pnpm --filter admin-panel dev"
scripts.dev:miniapp:log-tail: bash -c 'f=$(ls -t "$HOME"/miniapp-dev-*.log 2>/dev/null | head -1); if [ -n "$f" ]; then echo "=== $f ==="; tail -n 150 "$f"; else echo "Нет $HOME/miniapp-dev-*.log — запусти dev с tee и переменной LOG (см. чат)."; fi'
